summary: Completed frontend testing of redesigned BusinessProfilePage (Fresha/Airbnb style). All 11 test features verified. Page loads correctly with photo gallery, sticky navigation, all sections (services, about, location, reviews, faq), booking sidebar, mobile booking bar, and Save/Share buttons.

backend_issues.notes: Backend testing skipped as per request (frontend only)

issues: Map shows placeholder icon instead of OpenStreetMap when business has no lat/long coordinates - this is expected behavior for test business

passed_tests: ✓ Photo gallery (grid) displays correctly - Airbnb style with 5 photos
✓ Business name 'Test Business' and address shown
✓ Sticky navigation (Servicios, Equipo, Reseñas, Ubicación) renders and scroll-to-section works
✓ services-section renders with empty state 'No hay servicios disponibles'
✓ about-section renders with description 'A test business for API testing'
✓ reviews-section renders with empty state 'Aún no hay reseñas. ¡Sé el primero!'
✓ faq-section renders with 4 FAQ items, accordion opens/closes correctly
✓ booking-sidebar displays with 'Reservar ahora' button and contact info
✓ favorite-button (Guardar) redirects to login when unauthenticated
✓ Homepage (/) loads correctly with hero, search, categories
✓ /search page loads correctly with filters and business results
✓ Team section correctly hidden when no workers
✓ Hours section correctly hidden when no workers
critical_code_review_comments: BusinessProfilePage.jsx is well-structured at 962 lines with proper component separation
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
Empty states handled gracefully for all sections
context_for_next_testing_agent: BusinessProfilePage redesign verified complete. Test business slug: test-business-5ecc65fc. Key data-testids verified: business-profile-page, business-name, section-nav, services-section, about-section, location-section, reviews-section, faq-section, booking-sidebar, sidebar-book-now, mobile-booking-bar, mobile-book-now, favorite-button. Test business has minimal data (no services, no workers, no reviews) so conditional sections (team, hours, similar) correctly don't render. All features work as expected.
